sql_array: CREATE TABLE scripts (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR(255), content TEXT, status VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO scripts VALUES (2, NULL, 'Sample content', 'edit');
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.script_source_update(id, url, content) FROM scripts WHERE status = 'edit' AND (url IS NULL OR content IS NULL);
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.script_source_update(id, 'file:/NewLoanFlow.bpel', (SELECT content FROM scripts WHERE id = 3 AND content IS NOT NULL)) FROM scripts WHERE status IS NOT NULL;
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.script_source_update((SELECT MAX(id) FROM scripts WHERE url IS NOT NULL), 'file:/AnotherFlow.bpel', NULL) WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scripts WHERE status = 'edit') > 0;
SELECT id FROM scripts WHERE (status = 'edit' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scripts WHERE content IS NULL) IS NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(url) > 0;
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.script_source_update(id, url, (CASE WHEN content IS NULL THEN 'Updated Content' ELSE content END)) FROM scripts WHERE url IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scripts) > 0;
SELECT url FROM scripts WHERE content IS NOT NULL AND (content IS NOT NULL OR url IS NULL) ORDER BY url DESC LIMIT 1;
